heading_path: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management

headers: People have the right to be involved in discussions and make informed decisions about their care, as described in NICE's information on making decisions about your care . Making decisions using NICE guidelines explains how we use words to show the strength (or certainty) of our recommendations, and has information about prescribing medicines (including off-label use), professional guidelines, standards and laws (including on consent and mental capacity), and safeguarding. Healthcare professionals should follow our general guidelines for people delivering care: patient experience in adult NHS services shared decision making medicines adherence medicines optimisation multimorbidity
